svg.title: CPU Scheduler fairness dashboard for interactive-bursts
svg.desc: Per-process slowdown and waiting-time bars comparing FCFS, SJF, SRTF, PRIORITY (aging=2), RR (q=2), MLFQ (q=2/4/8, boost=12).
svg.text: workload=interactive-bursts · preset=interactive-bursts · quantum=2 · aging=2 · mlfq_q=2/4/8 · mlfq_boost=12 · context_switch_cost=1
Lower is better. Each bar is one process under one algorithm.
